languages.title: Reo
languages.subtitle: Kōwhiria te reo e whakamahia ana puta noa i te taupānga.
languages.noResults: Kāore he reo e ōrite ana ki tō rapunga.

phone.label: Tau waea:
phone.searchCountry: Rapua te whenua, te waehere, te kuhimua waea rānei
phone.noCountries: Kāore he whenua e ōrite ana ki tō rapunga.
phone.countryButton: Hurihia te whenua, i tēnei wā %{country} me te %{callingCode}
phone.tooShort: He poto rawa tēnei tau waea.
phone.tooLong: He roa rawa tēnei tau waea.
phone.invalid: Tāurua he tau waea tika mō te whenua kua tīpakohia.

auth.onboardingTagline: He hoa haumaru whaiaro mō ngā wā i waenganui i te "Kei te pai ahau" me te "Kei te hiahia āwhina ahau."
auth.createSubtitle: Kōwhiria he aratuka takiuru hei pare i tō kauwhata haumaru.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Kāore i taea te takiuru te whakaoti. Takina tō hononga ka ngana anō ai.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Kāore te Takiuru i te wātea
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Mā te whakamahi i tētahi wātū whanaketanga paetata. Ka mahi a Native Google Sign-In i roto i tētahi hanga whanaketanga.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Takiruatia ināianei, haere tonu rānei ka tāpiri ā muri ake.
auth.northStarBody: Ka taea e te mauranga VL01 te whakaoho i ngā rerenga haumaru mā ngā pato me ngā tohu pēhi roa.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Tō hoa haumaru mārire i runga i te mahere me ngā waea.
auth.capybearBody: Ka taea e Capybear te āwhina ki te aratau kāinga, te aratau kaitiaki, te aratau ohorere, ngā waea takunga, me te tautoko reo.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Whakamahia mō te mahere, ngā rohe mōrearea, te taenga haumaru, me te horopaki SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving tono tauwāhi kia mārama ai ngā kaitiaki ki te wāhi e hiahiatia ai te āwhina. Ka taea e koe tēnei te whakarerekē ā muri ake i Ngā Tautuhinga.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: E tautoko ana ngā whakamōhiotanga i ngā takiuru me ngā takahanga ohotata.
permissions.notificationsBody: Ka whakamahi anake mātou i ngā whakamōhiotanga mō ngā tohuāki haumaru, ngā whakahōutanga ohorere, me ngā whakamaumahara ka whakahohea e koe.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Mā te tauwāhi e pupuri i te horopaki haumaru kia tika
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: Ka whakamahi VeryLoving i tō tauwāhi mō te mahere haumaru, ngā rohe mōrearea, te tiri tere, me te horopaki SOS. Ka taea e koe tēnei te whakarerekē ā muri ake i Ngā Tautuhinga.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Me whai whakamōhiotanga ngā matohi haumaru
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving tuku whakamaumahara takiuru, whakahōutanga ohorere, me ngā tohutohu haumaru ka whakahohea e koe. Kāore mātou e whakamahi i ngā whakamōhiotanga mō ngā pānuitanga.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Ka whakamana te uruoro i ngā waea haumaru
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving whakamahi anake i tō uruoro ina tīmata koe i tētahi hoa AI, waea haumaru rānei.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth tūhono ai i tō mauranga
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: Ka whakamahia e VeryLoving Bluetooth hei takirua ki NorthStar taonga, ki te pānui i te tūnga hononga, me te whakaoho i ngā rerenga haumaru mai i te mauranga.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving ka whakamahi anake i te kāmera ina kōwhiri koe ki te tango whakaahua kōtaha, ki te tiri rānei i tētahi atahanga haumaru.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ka wātea tēnei rerenga mai i Ngā Tautuhinga me te paemana.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Kōwhiria te reo hoa e tino haumaru ana ki te rongo.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Te aroturuki mārire mō te haumarutanga o ia rā.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Tiria te horopaki ki ngā tāngata whirinaki.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: E rima ngā pato ka taea te whakanui ake ki ngā matohi SOS me ngā kaitiaki.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Waihangatia he take ātaahua hei waiho i tētahi āhuatanga hāneanea.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Tīmataria he waea hoa wā tūturu ina hiahia tautoko koe.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Whakamātauria ngā rerenga haumaru i roto i tētahi whakaaturanga pēhanga iti.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Puritia ngā taonga ki te taha i a koe e karapa ana.
jewelry.noDevices: Kāore anō kia kitea he pūrere NorthStar pātata.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth kore e taea te karapa te tīmata. Tēnā kia ngana anō.
jewelry.scanFailed: Kāore i kitea e mātau he taonga pātata. Takina Bluetooth, kia tata NorthStar, ka ngana anō.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth kore e taea te karapa te tīmata. Takina Bluetooth āheitanga ka ngana anō.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Kua weto te urunga pūrere-pātata. Tukua Bluetooth urunga ki Ngā Tautuhinga, ka ngana anō.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar roa rawa te tūhono. Nekehia kia tata atu ka ngana anō.
jewelry.connectFailed: Kāore i taea e mātou te tūhono ki NorthStar. Tirohia mēnā kua whakahikotia, kua pātata mai, ka ngana anō.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Kāore anō kia whai pūrere pātata
jewelry.emptyMessage: Kia NorthStar whakahiko tonu, kia tata hoki ki tēnei waea, ka karapa anō.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Kei te kimi NorthStar pūrere pātata mai...

home.subtitle: Paemana hoa haumaru
home.readyBody: Kotahi te pato o te reo, te mahere, te taonga, me ngā kaitiaki.

map.title: Mahere haumaru
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go arokite; Mapbox tāhuahua i roto i tētahi hanga whanaketanga.
map.updateFailed: Kāore i taea e mātou tō tauwāhi te whakahōu. Tēnā kia ngana anō.
map.notRequested: Kāore i tonoa te āheitanga tauwāhi. Ka taea e koe te whakahohe ā muri ake mai i Ngā Tautuhinga.
map.permissionOff: Kua weto te urunga tauwāhi. Whakahohea i roto i Ngā Tautuhinga hei whakawaenga i te mahere haumaru ki a koe.
map.timeout: Kei te roa ake tō tauwāhi i te mea e tūmanakohia ana. Nuku ki tētahi wāhi whai tohu mārama ake, ka ngana anō.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Kāore anō kia tiakina ngā wāhi
map.savedEmptyMessage: Ka puta mai ki konei ngā wāhi whirinaki ka tiakina e koe kia tere ai te urunga.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Tūhono haumaru ana ki tō hoa reo...

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} karere e tatari ana ki te tuku
messagesWaiting.other: %{count} ngā karere e tatari ana ki te tuku

safetyCall.reconnect: Tūhono anō ki te AI reo
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Patohia mēnā he uaua te kōrero
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Ka tīmata tō kōrerorero i konei
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Tīmataria te waea, patohia rānei tētahi karere ina rite koe.

chat.retryAccessibility: Ngana anō ki te tuku karere

history.clearMessage: Mā tēnei e tango i ngā karere AI hoa kua tiakina mai i tēnei pūrere.
history.cannotUndo: Kāore e taea te wete i tēnei.
history.title: Hītori kōrerorero
history.subtitle: AI ngā karere hoa kua tiakina ki tēnei pūrere.
history.empty: Kāore anō kia tiakina ngā kōrerorero.
history.emptyMessage: Ka puta mai ō kōrerorero hoa AI ki konei i muri i tō waea tuatahi.
history.loadFailed: Kāore i taea e mātou te uta hītori kōrerorero. Tēnā kia ngana anō.
history.clearFailed: Kāore i taea e mātou te ūkui te hītori kōrerorero. Tēnā kia ngana anō.
history.deleteFailed: Kāore i taea e mātou taua kōrerorero te muku. Tēnā kia ngana anō.

voices.title: Aku reo waea haumaru
voices.subtitle: Kōwhiria te reo hoa e tika ana kia rongo.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Ngana koa ki te kōwhiri anō i te reo.
voices.sampleFailedTitle: Kāore te tauira i te wātea
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Kāore i taea te purei i tēnei tauira reo. Tēnā kia ngana anō.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Whakamahia ngā urupare hoa paiheretia ki te kore e wātea te whatunga, Hume rānei o ngā pūkenga.
settings.privacyBody: Kaweake, mukua rānei ngā raraunga paetata kua penapenatia ki tēnei pūrere.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Kāore e taea tō raraunga te kaweake i tēnei wā tonu.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Mā tēnei e tango tō kōtaha, ō tautuhinga, ō hoapā ohotata, hītori kōrerorero, ngā whakamaumahara whakaaetanga, me te wātū motuhēhēnga paetata mai i tēnei pūrere.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Kāore e taea te muku raraunga paetata i tēnei wā tonu.
settings.linkFailed: Kāore e taea te whakatuwhera hono

sections.languageSubtitle: Reo atanga me te whakaaetanga pūnaha
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, ngā kaitiaki, me ngā hoapā ohotata
sections.privacySubtitle: Hītori, kaweake, mukunga, me te kaupapahere

settings.updateFailedMessage: Kāore i taea e mātou te tiaki i taua manakohanga. Tēnā kia ngana anō.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Kei te hohe tonu tō wātū. Tēnā kia ngana anō.

contacts.title: Ngā hoapā ohotata
contacts.subtitle: E wātea ana ngā tāngata whirinaki i te wā o ngā rerenga haumaru.
contacts.name: Ingoa
contacts.empty: Kāore anō kia tāpirihia he hoapā ohorere.
contacts.emptyTitle: Kāore anō kia whai hoapā ohorere
contacts.emptyMessage: Tāpirihia tētahi tangata e whakawhirinaki ana koe kia rite ai ia ina hiahiatia e tētahi rerenga haumaru.
contacts.removeMessage: Ka kore tēnei tangata e puta mai i tō rerenga ohorere.
contacts.nameRequired: Tāurua te ingoa o te hoapā.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Kāore i taea tēnei hoapā te tiaki. Takina ngā taipitopito ka ngana anō.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Kāore i taea e mātou tēnei hoapā te tango. Tēnā kia ngana anō.

device.title: Whakahaerenga pūrere
device.subtitle: Whakahaerehia tō pūrere NorthStar.
device.none: Kāore he pūrere e tūhono ana

friends.title: Ngā Hoa
friends.subtitle: Ngā kaitiaki, ngā tono, me te kauwhata ohotata.
friends.emptyTitle: Kei te putu tō porohita haumaru
friends.emptyMessage: Ka puta mai ngā hoa me ngā kaitiaki pono ki konei ina tāpirihia.

emergency.title: Ohotata SOS
emergency.subtitle: Whakanuia anake ina hiahia tautoko wawe koe.
emergency.body: Mā tēnei e whakamōhio atu tō rerenga haumaru me te whakarite i ngā hoapā ohotata.
emergency.addContact: Tāpirihia he hoapā ohorere ki Ngā Tautuhinga.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Kua rite te tumu tiri tauwāhi. Tūhonoa te tōpito tiri backend hei tuku hononga ora.

quickShare.title: Tiri tere
quickShare.subtitle: Kua rite te rerenga tiri tauwāhi.

capybearTap.title: Capybear pato
capybearTap.subtitle: Pato-tauruatia tō NorthStar hei whakataka i tētahi ārani haumaru.
capybearTap.body: Kua rite te ara tohu ā-ringa mō te taura takahanga BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Te āhua nei tuimotu koe. Ka tukua tō karere ina tūhono anō koe.
errors.voiceQueued: Kua tiakina te karere. Ka tukua ina tūhono anō te hoa reo.
errors.voiceRetrying: E ngana ana ki te tuku anō i tō karere...
errors.voiceConnecting: Tūhono haumaru ana ki tō hoa reo...
errors.microphone: E hiahiatia ana te urunga uruoro mō ngā waea reo. Ka taea e koe te whakahohe i roto i Ngā Tautuhinga, te pato rānei i tētahi karere.
errors.billing: Kāore te hoa reo tuihono i te wātea mō te wā poto. Ka taea e koe te haere tonu me te hoa tuimotu.
errors.authentication: Kāore i taea e te hoa reo te manatoko i tēnei wātū. Takiuru anō, whakamahia rānei te hoa tuimotu mō tēnei wā.
errors.timeout: He roa rawa te urupare a te hoa reo. Takina tō hononga ka ngana anō ai.
errors.network: Kaore i taea e mātau te toro atu ki te hoa reo. Tirohia tō tūhononga, ka ngana anō, ka haere tuimotu tonu.
errors.genericVoice: Ka haukotia e tētahi mea te waea reo. Ngana anō, haere tonu rānei me te hoa tuimotu.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving hiahia ana ki te urunga uruoro mō te haumaru me te AI waea hoa.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ka whakamahi VeryLoving i tō tauwāhi mō te mahere haumaru me ngā āhuahira haumaru pātata.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving whakamahi Bluetooth hei tūhono ki ō taonga haumaru NorthStar.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Kāore tēnei putanga e wātea ana tēnei kōwhiringa takiuru.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Haere tonu hei whakaaturanga (mō te whakawhanaketanga anake)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Ka whakamahi te aratau whakaaturanga i ngā raraunga rūpahu paetata anake. Kāore ngā ratonga tūhono i whakamotuhēhēngia, ā, ka tautuhia anō tēnei wāhanga ina utaina anō te taupānga.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kua muhu, kua mōnehu rānei te waehere manatoko. Tonoa he waehere hōu, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: He nui rawa ngā nganatanga takiuru. Taihoa ake, kātahi ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: He roa rawa te manatoko takiuru. Tirohia tō hononga, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Kāore i taea te toro atu ki te ratonga takiuru. Tirohia tō hononga, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Kua mōnehu tō wāhanga. Takiuru anō.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Kāore i taea te uta te mahere haumaru. Tirohia tō hononga, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Kāore te tauwāhi mataora i te wātea. E whakaatu ana i tō tauwāhi whakamutunga i tiakina mai i %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Kāore i taea te tiri i tō tauwāhi. Tirohia te āhei ki te tauwāhi, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Anei taku tauwāhi i tuhia i %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Anei taku tauwāhi whakamutunga i tiakina, i tuhia i %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Kua weto te āhei ki Bluetooth. Whakakāngia ki Ngā Tautuhinga, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Kua whakawetohia a Bluetooth. Whakakāngia, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Kāore te whakahono Bluetooth i te wātea ki tēnei pūrere, ki tēnei putanga rānei.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Kāore i kitea a NorthStar. Puritia kia tata, tirohia a Bluetooth, ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Kāore he pūrere NorthStar tata i kitea. Puritia kia tata, ka matawai anō.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Kāore i taea te tūhono ki NorthStar. Kia whai pūhiko, kia tata hoki, kātahi ka ngana anō.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Kāore i taea te tiaki i tēnei wāhi. Ngana anō.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Kua huakina te waea tau; kāore te waea i whakaūngia.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Kua whakakorea; kāore he waea i tukuna.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Kāore he hoapā ohotata i te wātea; kāore he waea i tukuna.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Kāore i taea te huaki te waea tau; kāore he waea i tukuna.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Kāore i taea te whakaū i te nganatanga SOS whakamutunga.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Kāore te hoa ā-reo i te wātea i tēnei wā. Ngana anō ā muri ake, haere tonu rānei me te hoa tuimotu.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
